sentence: 我姑姑每年春节都来我们家。
pinyin: Wǒ gūgu měi nián Chūnjié dōu lái wǒmen jiā.
english: My aunt (father's sister) comes to our house every Spring Festival.

sentence: 她喜欢穿宽松的衣服，感觉舒服。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān chuān kuānsōng de yīfu, gǎnjué shūfu.
english: She likes wearing loose clothes because they feel comfortable.

meaning: 1. police department; 2. police station; 3. abbr. of 警察局
sentence: 他去警局报告了丢失钱包的事。
pinyin: Tā qù jǐngjú bàogào le diūshī qiánbāo de shì.
english: He went to the police station to report his lost wallet.

sentence: 这家酒店刚获得了五星评级。
pinyin: Zhè jiā jiǔdiàn gāng huòdé le wǔ xīng píngjí.
english: This hotel just received a five-star rating.

sentence: 消费者可以通过投诉渠道维权。
pinyin: Xiāofèizhě kěyǐ tōngguò tóusù qúdào wéiquán.
english: Consumers can defend their rights through complaint channels.
